chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.736 of 2026 (Najeebullah vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Khalid Hussain Shahani For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 13.04.2026 Mr. Farhan Ali Shah, advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in a case bearing Crime No.535/2025, registered at Police Station Mouchko, u/s 6/9 (C) CNS Act, 2024, by means of this application. 2. Applicant was arrested on suspicion by a police team of Police Station Mouchko from main Hub River Road, on 19.12.2025 while traveling in a passenger Mazda, Upon his search, 4010 grams of charas was recovered from his possession. Hence, he was booked in the present case. 3. Learned defence counsel has pleaded for bail on the grounds that registration number of vehicle is not mentioned; private witnesses have not been associated and that applicant is a government servant. 4. On the other hand, learned Addl: PG has opposed bail while stating that video recording of the incident is available. 5. We have considered submissions of the parties and perused material available on record. Prima facie, there are reasonable grounds to believe applicant’s involvement in the case, as a huge quantity of narcotic chars was recovered from his possession which is not only witnessed but also video recorded. The grounds taken by the applicant’s counsel need deeper inquiry, which cannot be undertaken at bail stage. No case for bail is made, therefore, this bail application is dismissed. However, the trial Court is directed to conclude the case as soon as possible. 6.

No case for bail is made, therefore, this bail application is dismissed. However, the trial Court is directed to conclude the case as soon as possible. 6. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
